gauge.name: East Fork Angelina River near Cushing

impacts.statement: High water begins overflowing the Farm to Market 225 highway bridge.  Expect several thousand flooded acres along the entire length of the East Fork to its confluence with the Angelina River.
Water approaches bottom of bridge decking.  Several hundred acres flooded.
Expect several hundred flooded acres.  Water approaches the bottom of the Farm to Market 225 highway bridge.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Expect several dozen flooded acres.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Expect flooding of several secondary roadways. Ranchers should move cattle and equipment to higher ground.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Automated gauge readings are now available, courtesy of the USGS.
River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
